---
title: "OPALX Report Archive"
description: "Searchable archive of unnumbered OPALX report and presentation detail pages."
audience: user
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
number-sections: false
---

[Return to the manual's Presentations and Reports catalog](../presentations-reports.html)

Report detail pages are kept outside the numbered manual and grouped by year.
Use this archive's search to find titles and text across a growing collection.

## 2026

| Date | Entry | Kind | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| 2026-07-14 | [CUDA extended-lambda linkage bug](2026/cuda-extended-lambda-linkage-bug.qmd) | Bug investigation | Resolved with workaround |
| 2026-04-30 | [OpalElement layout proposal](2026/opal-element-layout-proposal.qmd) | Design report | Experimental |
| 2026-04-06 | [OPALX overview](2026/opalx-overview.qmd) | Architecture presentation | Current |

New report pages placed in a four-digit year directory are picked up by the
archive project. Also add each entry to the year-sorted catalog in the main
manual so readers have one stable browsing page.
